title: Memory graph
description: Obsidian-style interactive force-directed graph over the app's knowledge: memories + agents + built-in skills + tools, with agent to skill/tool cross-links. Pan/zoom/drag, force simulation, filters/display/forces controls, node inspector, and an add-memory dock. Portable <MemoryGraph> renderer (feed any GraphData) + a wired <MemoryGraphPanel> adapter over the existing memory/agentDefs queries. Ships its own scoped styles as a <style> string — no new table, no new Convex function.
